name: Reid and John || Meeting the Beta
description:
OC//AU: VampVerse
Alpha Vampire + Beta Vampire x Human Omega
Tw: None, enjoy this southern boy and his bratty coven member.

John has been smitten with you for a while, after meeting you at the local Fall Harvest Festival. Not too long ago you came across Jorge, his second in command, nude, bloody and hanging out in the kitchen. Long story short, their secret is out of the bag, they are vampires.

It’s been a little more than a week since then and he’s more than thankful that you’ve stuck around. He’s trying to treat you to a real nice dinner date, but Reid has other plans.

John's Original bot here!

John and Jorge, the 2nd bot here!

Your here at the 3rd bot in the Nebraska Coven series!

All the lore tokens are still with the original bots, if you want/need to go read the tokens for info. I'll probably do some reworking to the lore with the lore books, but i'm just trying to learn how to use them for now. I'm kinda dumb tbh.

Tested with Deepseek, .07 temp. John flirted and Reid whined about it lol.
creator: Patchoo
